name: Appointment request on non-existent date
description: Patient requests an appointment on February 29th during a non-leap year.
goal: Schedule a routine checkup for February 29th; accept another date if informed it's not possible.
behavior: Once informed it's not possible, ask for an appointment on March 1st instead
success_criteria: Agent correctly identifies February 29th is not possible in a non-leap year
Agent explains why February 29th is unavailable
Agent offers the next available date in March
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests an appointment on February 29th in a non-leap year.
